name: Defiance
message: DefianceDefiance Energy Services, LLC provides water hauling and other services to energy producers throughout the Haynesville Shale. We offer low-cost and efficient services that minimize non-productive time for our customers. In business since 2008, we are now one of the largest water haulers in the Haynesville. We run about 50 vacuum truck each day, serving our customers 24/7/365. In all our work, the safety of our employees, customers, and the environment are paramount. To that end, we maintain a rigorous compliance program to exceed all federal, state, and local regulatory requirements. Our combination of efficiency, reliability, and safety make us the right choice for your service needs.Geo: USA - Leak size: 188 GB Archive - Contains: Files
